sub: When a conflict warning arrives 800 ms late, it isn't a warning anymore

title: Minimizing Latency with Modern Protocols
desc: Faster transmission, smarter error correction, less overhead

rows: Developed by Google, built on UDP — cuts connection setup time and handles packet loss per-stream
Runs on QUIC — faster page and API response times through true multiplexing (no head-of-line blocking)
Accelerated handshake for secure connections (1-RTT, resumption with 0-RTT)
Google's TCP congestion-control algorithm — uses available bandwidth optimally and minimizes queuing delay
Direct memory access over the network — drastic latency reduction, mainly inside data centers
Real-time communication protocol for low-latency video and audio
Designed for real-time applications: industry, autonomous driving, telemedicine — and drone command & control

title: Edge Computing for Real-Time Processing
desc: Process the data where it is produced — not in a distant data center

items: Data is processed at the edge of the network, at or near its source — not centrally in remote data centers
Removes the round trip to the cloud: real-time processing becomes possible
For drones: obstacle avoidance, sensor fusion and flight control must run on board or at the nearest base station — a 100 ms cloud round trip is a crashed drone
The cloud still matters — for fleet analytics, model training and everything that is not time-critical

body.card: Edge + machine learning: reinforcement learning on drones
items: RL agents learn control policies through trial and error — trained in simulation, executed at the edge
State of the art: RL-controlled racing drones beating human champion pilots (University of Zurich research)
The inference loop runs entirely on board — the ultimate edge deployment
